name: design-html

verdict: This skill is designed to generate HTML/CSS based on various inputs, incorporating advanced layout techniques and UX principles. It includes extensive preamble logic for configuration, telemetry, and session management. highlights.summary: Telemetry data (skill name, timestamp, repo name) is written to a local file, which is then potentially uploaded by gstack-telemetry-log.
Downloads bun install script via curl and pipes it to bash without review, then executes it.
Instructs to recursively remove a directory from the git repository without explicit user confirmation.
